name: Burrito Casserole
recipeIngredient: 12 oz Block Monterey Jack Cheese, grated
1 can Chopped green chilis (unless cheese is the kind with Jalapenos)
1 lb Ground beef, browned, with onion & garlic. Drain fat
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix tomato sauce with browned hamburg and onions. Set aside.
2. Soften the tortillas in the microwave.
3. Spread the first tortilla with refried beans.
4. Sprinkle heavily with grated cheese.
5. Put in a round 1 1/2 qt casserole dish.
6. Spread a thin layer of beans on the second tortilla.
7. Place it on top of the first layer.
8. Spread generously with meat mixture, add peppers and a scant sprinkling of cheese.
9. Continue layering tortillas, alternating between bean & cheese combos and meat & pepper combinations.
10. Reserve enough beans to spread a thin layer on the top tortilla.
11. Cover it with a thick layer of cheese.
12. Cover with saran wrap.
13. Heat on Medium in the microwave for approximately 10 minutes until heated through.
14. Serve with salsa and sour cream on the side. A salad and/or guacamole works well with this.
